name: Whatcha Up To?
overview: A new type of talk show where the MCs visit a neighborhood and spontaneously call their acquaintances who live in the area! More people are eating and drinking alone after work these days. Making dinner plans with your friends often requires you to muster the courage because of your busy lives. This spontaneous talk show is perfect for people like you. Kim Hee-sun and the MCs visit a neighborhood and make spontaneous calls to their friends living in the area to chat over delicious food—and also treat the neighborhood locals to a meal! In this spontaneous talk show, the MCs invite their neighborhood friends to grab a meal together.
